criteria_verification.evidence: create_rag_retrieval_tool returns a LangChain StructuredTool (BaseTool subclass) with name='rag_retrieval' and a description. Verified by TestFactoryReturnsTool (3 tests).
criteria_verification.notes: create_rag_retrieval_tool returns a LangChain StructuredTool (BaseTool subclass) with name='rag_retrieval' and a description. Verified by TestFactoryReturnsTool (3 tests).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Collection name is bound at factory time, not passed per call
criteria_verification.evidence: collection_name is captured in the factory closure and used in get_collection(name=collection_name). The tool's args_schema only exposes 'query' and 'n_results', not 'collection_name'. Verified by TestCollectionNameBinding (2 tests).
criteria_verification.notes: collection_name is captured in the factory closure and used in get_collection(name=collection_name). The tool's args_schema only exposes 'query' and 'n_results', not 'collection_name'. Verified by TestCollectionNameBinding (2 tests).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: ChromaDB `PersistentClient` is lazily initialised on first call
criteria_verification.evidence: PersistentClient is not called during factory creation. It is created inside _get_client() on the first tool invocation using a nonlocal list holder pattern. Verified by TestLazyInitialisation (2 tests) and TestLazyImportPattern (1 test).
criteria_verification.notes: PersistentClient is not called during factory creation. It is created inside _get_client() on the first tool invocation using a nonlocal list holder pattern. Verified by TestLazyInitialisation (2 tests) and TestLazyImportPattern (1 test).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Subsequent calls reuse the same client connection
criteria_verification.evidence: The client_holder list stores the client after first creation; subsequent calls return client_holder[0] without calling PersistentClient again. Three invocations verified to produce exactly one PersistentClient call. Verified by TestClientReuse (1 test).
criteria_verification.notes: The client_holder list stores the client after first creation; subsequent calls return client_holder[0] without calling PersistentClient again. Three invocations verified to produce exactly one PersistentClient call. Verified by TestClientReuse (1 test).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Returns formatted chunks with source metadata: `--- Chunk N (source: file.pdf, p.X) ---`
criteria_verification.evidence: Chunks formatted as '--- Chunk {i} (source: {source}, p.{page}) ---\n{text}\n' using _format_chunk helper. Verified single chunk and multi-chunk formatting plus empty results. Verified by TestFormattedOutput (3 tests).
criteria_verification.notes: Chunks formatted as '--- Chunk {i} (source: {source}, p.{page}) ---\n{text}\n' using _format_chunk helper. Verified single chunk and multi-chunk formatting plus empty results. Verified by TestFormattedOutput (3 tests).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Validates n_results: 1 ≤ n_results ≤ 20 (returns error string if out of range)
criteria_verification.evidence: n_results validated at start of rag_retrieval function. Values <1 or >20 return 'Error: n_results must be between 1 and 20 inclusive' strings. Boundary values 1 and 20 accepted. Verified by TestNResultsValidation (7 tests).
criteria_verification.notes: n_results validated at start of rag_retrieval function. Values <1 or >20 return 'Error: n_results must be between 1 and 20 inclusive' strings. Boundary values 1 and 20 accepted. Verified by TestNResultsValidation (7 tests).

criteria_verification.evidence: rag_retrieval tool function signature has n_results: int = 5. Verified that collection.query is called with n_results=5 when not explicitly provided. Verified by TestDefaultNResults (1 test).
criteria_verification.notes: rag_retrieval tool function signature has n_results: int = 5. Verified that collection.query is called with n_results=5 when not explicitly provided. Verified by TestDefaultNResults (1 test).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Returns all available chunks if collection has fewer than n_results
criteria_verification.evidence: Tool formats whatever documents ChromaDB returns (even if fewer than requested). When 5 requested but only 2 returned, output contains Chunk 1 and Chunk 2 only. Verified by TestFewerChunksThanRequested (1 test).
criteria_verification.notes: Tool formats whatever documents ChromaDB returns (even if fewer than requested). When 5 requested but only 2 returned, output contains Chunk 1 and Chunk 2 only. Verified by TestFewerChunksThanRequested (1 test).

criteria_verification.evidence: _validate_collection_name uses regex ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_-]*$ to reject path traversal (../, /, \), spaces, semicolons, dollar signs, and other unsafe characters.
